response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and leadership in technical roles, but his background leans more toward general software engineering and developer tooling rather than specialized experience in build systems, testing infrastructure, or mobile platform ecosystems. His recent roles in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling are relevant, but he lacks direct experience in managing organizational change or leading teams in a mobile platform context.
strengths: Strong software development background with experience in developer tools and testing frameworks
Technical leadership in multiple roles, including mentoring and organizing workshops
Experience with open-source projects and community engagement
concerns: Limited direct experience with mobile platform ecosystems or build systems
No explicit experience in people management or organizational change leadership
Recent roles focus more on general engineering than specialized developer productivity tools

key_factors.factor: People management in a technical leadership role
